sub_modules.ifft16_bit_reverse_addr: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal mapper used while loading DIT input order.
sub_modules.ifft16_stage_addr_gen: Combinational radix-2 stage address and twiddle-index generator for the iterative controller.
sub_modules.ifft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16 with FFT/IFFT sine sign selection.
sub_modules.ifft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with rounded Q1.15 twiddle multiplication.
